scripts.dev: npm run db:up && concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w client"
scripts.build: npm run build -w server && npm run build -w client
scripts.db:up: node scripts/require-env-file.mjs dev .dev-env .dev-env.example && docker compose --env-file .dev-env up -d --wait postgres
scripts.db:down: node scripts/require-env-file.mjs dev .dev-env .dev-env.example && docker compose --env-file .dev-env stop postgres
scripts.test: npm run test -w server && npm run test -w client
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w server && npm run typecheck -w client
